findings.name: target_expansion
findings.details: install_lora expands allowlisted lastN_ffn groups to exact blk.*.ffn_gate/up/down module paths and fails loudly on unknown groups or zero installs.

findings.name: generated_qk_training
findings.details: Backprop through generated QK primitive/frozen quant layers hits unsupported bit-op gradient (Ops.OR). Internal adapter training cannot use the generated QK inference path directly.

findings.name: plain_block_training
findings.details: The adapter trainer can bypass block-level precompile wrappers so internal adapter tensors receive gradients.

findings.name: baseline_no_realize_smoke
findings.details: A one-step last4_ffn baseline/no-REALIZE smoke over 10 rows passes and changes adapter tensors (adapter_l2 0.876816).

findings.name: baseline_realize_full
findings.details: Full last4_ffn training with REALIZE=1 OOMs on AMD at 23.78 GB used while allocating 1.64 MB.

findings.name: baseline_no_realize_full
findings.details: Full last4_ffn, full last1_ffn, and a reduced last1_ffn smoke were manually stopped after long runtimes without producing a summary. The plain-block path is not yet an ergonomic 8B training gate.

verdict: Do not promote internal adapters yet. The target-policy/code path is ready, but 8B internal-adapter training needs a dedicated lower-memory/faster training path before rerunning the strict JSON gate.
